block_00: Changes to overnight fees for CFD positions
block_02: We would like to inform you of an upcoming important change to overnight fees for keeping a CFD position open overnight. Beginning of 9 July 2020, overnight fees will be deducted from the trading account balance. Overnight fees will no longer be deducted from investments.
block_03: Please note that these changes are applicable to both new CFD positions and/or existing CFD positions that remain open until the 9 July 2020.
block_04: Should you have any questions or would like further clarification, please feel free to contact us  at
block_05: We appreciate you choosing our platform and for being part of IQOption.
